title: eryngium campestre var. campestre
intro: Eryngium campestre var. campestre, also known as field eryngium, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the carrot family (Apiaceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Eryngium campestre var. campestre include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and supporting digestive health. In herbal preparations, it is often used in teas, infusions, or tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential interactions.
